metadata.title: Design a production-grade blueprint document for a financial operations system in the Middle East, incorporating failure-lens analysis to identify and mitigate operational risks, with explicit validation gates at each stage.

mission.primary_objective: Design a production-grade blueprint document for a financial operations system in the Middle East, incorporating failure-lens analysis to identify and mitigate operational risks, with explicit validation gates at each stage.
mission.success_definition: Blueprint document is reviewed and approved by a compliance officer.; All failure modes have assigned mitigation actions with owners.; Validation gates are documented with pass/fail criteria and sign-off requirements.; Document is version-controlled and stored in a secure repository.

in_scope.item: The blueprint covers system architecture, data flow, compliance with regional financial regulations (e.g., AML, KYC), failure mode enumeration, risk mitigation strategies, and validation checkpoints. Excludes real-time trading systems and legacy migration details.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blueprint document is reviewed and approved by a compliance officer.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All failure modes have assigned mitigation actions with owners.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are documented with pass/fail criteria and sign-off requirements.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Document is version-controlled and stored in a secure repository.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.problem_statement: Design a production-grade blueprint document for a financial operations system in the Middle East, incorporating failure-lens analysis to identify and mitigate operational risks, with explicit validation gates at each stage.

objectives.item: Design a production-grade blueprint document for a financial operations system in the Middle East, incorporating failure-lens analysis to identify and mitigate operational risks, with explicit validation gates at each stage.

requirements.item: The blueprint covers system architecture, data flow, compliance with regional financial regulations (e.g., AML, KYC), failure mode enumeration, risk mitigation strategies, and validation checkpoints. Excludes real-time trading systems and legacy migration details.

acceptance_criteria.item: Blueprint document is reviewed and approved by a compliance officer.
All failure modes have assigned mitigation actions with owners.
Validation gates are documented with pass/fail criteria and sign-off requirements.
Document is version-controlled and stored in a secure repository.

implementation_plan.item: The blueprint covers system architecture, data flow, compliance with regional financial regulations (e.g., AML, KYC), failure mode enumeration, risk mitigation strategies, and validation checkpoints. Excludes real-time trading systems and legacy migration details.

validation_plan.item: format: PDF with embedded metadata (version, author, date, approval status)

sections: Executive Summary; System Overview and Architecture; Failure-Lens Analysis (failure modes, probabilities, impacts, mitigations); Validation Gates (design gate, implementation gate, deployment gate); Compliance and Regulatory Alignment; Risk Register; Appendices (glossary, references, change log)
deliverable: A single PDF file meeting the above structure, with all sections populated and validation gates explicitly defined.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
